purpose: Record the focused Area & Explosives sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.canvasSpatialAutomation: Do not automate canvas geometry in this pass. Spatial targeting, template placement, line of sight, line of effect, and final affected targets remain metadata/advisory until a dedicated AoE workflow exists.
policy.autofireFeats: Autofire-based feats are modeled as riders on an autofire-capable attack instead of as independent attack systems.
policy.explosiveAreaFeats: Explosive and area feats expose runtime helpers for area shape, defense mutation, or post-damage advisory effects without moving tokens automatically.

implementedEntries.name: Targeted Area
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring area attack context. Adds +5 damage before Evasion when selected for one hit target. Target eligibility remains advisory/spatial.

implementedEntries.name: Spray Shot
implementedEntries.mechanic: Autofire rider. Runtime helper exposes selectable mutation from normal 2x2 Autofire area to a 1-square targeted area.

implementedEntries.name: Flood of Fire
implementedEntries.mechanic: Autofire Area Attack rider. Runtime helper exposes target Reflex mutation removing dodge and deflection bonuses for all targets in the Autofire area when weapon proficiency context passes.

implementedEntries.name: Strafe
implementedEntries.mechanic: Autofire rider. Runtime helper exposes selectable mutation from normal 2x2 Autofire area to a 1-square-wide, 4-square-long line, with Jet Pack path special metadata advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Forceful Blast
implementedEntries.mechanic: Grenade or thermal detonator damage rider. Runtime helper checks damage context, target size/grab/grapple flags, and attack total vs Fortitude Defense, then exposes eligible 1-square forced movement advisories for each target.

implementedEntries.name: Whirlwind Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Special full-round melee Area Attack action. Runtime helper exposes one-roll-against-all-targets-within-reach action metadata; reach and final target selection remain workflow/GM adjudicated.

implementedEntries.name: Mobility
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores advisory +5 dodge bonus against movement-provoked attacks of opportunity for future AoO workflow context.

excludedEntries.name: Friendly Fire Avoidance
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
